mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_dp_thermal WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY occur_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_dp_thermal WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_thermal WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_thermal WHERE deleted = 0 AND thermal_type = #{thermalType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_dp_thermal WHERE deleted = 0 AND severity = #{severity}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_dp_thermal (thermal_type, occur_date, location, worker_name, department, weather_condition, perceived_temp, symptoms, severity, treatment, outcome, prevention_action, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{thermalType}, #{occurDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{location,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{workerName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{weatherCondition,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{perceivedTemp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{symptoms,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{severity,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{treatment,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{outcome,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{preventionAction,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_dp_thermal SET thermal_type = #{thermalType}, occur_date = #{occurDate,jdbcType=DATE}, location = #{location,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, worker_name = #{workerName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, weather_condition = #{weatherCondition,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, perceived_temp = #{perceivedTemp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, symptoms = #{symptoms,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, severity = #{severity,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, treatment = #{treatment,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, outcome = #{outcome,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, prevention_action = #{preventionAction,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_dp_thermal SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
